# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that downloads build artifacts from external URLs provided as parameters and deploys them to production servers. This allows us to deploy pre-built artifacts from different sources (S3, Artifactory, HTTP servers) without rebuilding.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any

    options {
        buildDiscarder([maxNumberBuilds: 20])
    }

    parameters {
        string(name: 'ARTIFACT_URL', description: 'URL of the artifact to download')
        string(name: 'ARTIFACT_NAME', description: 'Name of the artifact to download')
        string(name: 'SERVERS', description: 'List of servers (comma-separated) where the artifact should be deployed')
    }

    stages {
        stage('Download Artifact') {
            steps {
                httpRequest url: "${params.ARTIFACT_URL}"
                sh "curl -o /tmp/${params.ARTIFACT_NAME} ${params.ARTIFACT_URL}"
            }
        }
        stage('Deploy to Production Servers') {
            steps {
                server sshConfigId: 'production-servers', credentialsId: 'prod-credentials'
                foreach (server in split(params.SERVERS, ',')) {
                    withEnv(['SERVER=${server}']) {
                        sh "scp /tmp/${params.ARTIFACT_NAME} ${user}@${server}:/path/to/deploy"
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }

    post {
        success {
            emailext body: 'Deployment successful', subject: 'Deployment Report',
            from: 'jenkins@example.com', recipientProviders: [[$class: 'DevelopersRecipientProvider']],
            to: 'dev@example.com'
        }
        failure {
            emailext body: 'Deployment failed', subject: 'Deployment Report',
            from: 'jenkins@example.com', recipientProviders: [[$class: 'DevelopersRecipientProvider']],
            to: 'dev@example.com'
        }
    }
}
